name: HILLS BANCORPORATION
summary: Hills Bancorporation is an Iowa-based bank holding company operating through its subsidiary Hills Bank and Trust Company. The Bank provides full-service commercial banking including demand, savings, and time deposits; commercial, real estate, agricultural, and consumer loans; trust and estate administration; investment advisory services; farm management; and secondary market mortgage origination to individuals, businesses, governmental units, and institutional customers across Iowa.
